examples: I'm a survivor. I'll get by.
General Geichenko was a survivor. His father, also a top-ranking officer, had perished during the war.
This soldier was the sole survivor of the battle.
"Wall Street Survivor" champion Brad Halverson has won thousands of dollars in fantasy contests.
Survivor Pierette Pierrot, 88, a French resistance fighter captured in 1944, came with her son to the ceremonies.
